info.title: uno-runtimetests-wasm
info.description:
Uno Platform WASM Runtime Tests Runner
Prerequisites:
- Install Playwright: npx playwright install chromium
- Or: dotnet tool install -g Microsoft.Playwright.CLI && playwright install chromium

options.name: --app-path
options.description: Path to the published WASM app directory

options.name: --output
options.description: Path where test results will be written

options.name: --filter
options.description: Test filter expression []

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Timeout in seconds for test execution [default: 300]

options.name: --port
options.description: Port to serve the WASM app on [default: 0]

options.name: --headless
options.description: Run browser in headless mode [default: True]

options.name: --browser-path
options.description: Path to the browser executable (auto-detected if not specified) []

options.name: --browser-arg
options.description: Additional argument to pass to the browser (can be specified multiple times)

options.name: --query-param
options.description: Additional query parameter to pass to the app URL in key=value format (can be specified multiple times)

options.name: --browser-log-level
options.description: Browser logging level: 'none' (suppress all), 'minimal' (errors only), 'verbose' (full logging) [default: minimal]

options.name: --aot-profile-output
options.description: Path where AOT profile data will be written (requires app built with WasmShellGenerateAOTProfile=true) []

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information
